title: Polytechnic University of the Philippines
subtitle: BS Information Technology (Sto. Tomas Campus)
description: A Consistent President's Lister balancing academic excellence with active student leadership. I spearheaded award-winning projects including the 'LANDAS' capstone, which was praised for its strict adherence to ISO/IEC 25010 software quality standards.

title: Arktech Philippines
subtitle: Full-Stack Developer Intern
description: Owned the end-to-end architecture for critical internal tools like 'Arkteach' and the 'Assembly Tree Finder.' I navigated the transition from local testing environments to live production servers, gaining deep experience in system stability and performance optimization.

title: Our Lady of Assumption College (OLAC)
subtitle: ICT - Software Development (Tanauan)
description: Graduated as the Top 1 student in the ICT Department (Batch 2019) and ranked 6th overall across all disciplines. This period solidified my technical foundation, culminating in a 'Best in Thesis' award that launched my interest in professional software development.
